mapper.select: SELECT m.id AS merchantId, m.name AS merchantName, COUNT(o.order_no) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS totalRevenue FROM merchant m LEFT JOIN order_info o ON m.id = o.merchant_id AND o.status = '已完成' AND o.create_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY m.id, m.name ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC

SELECT oi.dish_id AS dishId, oi.dish_name AS dishName, SUM(oi.quantity) AS totalQuantity FROM order_item oi JOIN order_info o ON oi.order_no = o.order_no WHERE o.status = '已完成' AND o.create_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY oi.dish_id, oi.dish_name ORDER BY totalQuantity DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT c.id AS customerId, c.name AS customerName, COUNT(o.order_no) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS totalSpending FROM customer c JOIN order_info o ON c.id = o.customer_id AND o.status = '已完成' AND o.create_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY totalSpending DESC
